Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules

package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring
     
  • Class
    Description
    CategoryDefinition
    A scoring category parsed from YAML.
    ExternalizedCategoryScorer
    Generic expression-driven scorer that evaluates rules from a CategoryDefinition against a RuleContext.
    RuleContext
    Builds a property namespace from TLS metadata and provides property resolution for the expression evaluator.
    RuleDefinition
    A single scoring rule parsed from YAML.
    RuleExpression
    AST nodes for the rule expression DSL.
    RuleExpression.And
     
    RuleExpression.Comparison
     
    RuleExpression.Contains
     
    RuleExpression.CountFiltered
    count(list, filterField op filterValue) — filtered count over a list of maps.
    RuleExpression.FunctionCall
     
    RuleExpression.Literal
     
    RuleExpression.Not
     
    RuleExpression.Or
     
    RuleExpression.PropertyRef
     
    RuleExpressionEvaluator
    Evaluates a RuleExpression AST against a RuleContext.
    RuleExpressionParser
    Recursive descent parser for the rule expression DSL.
    RulePolicy
    Complete loaded YAML rule policy: metadata, severity mapping, grade mapping, and category definitions with pre-parsed expressions.
    RulePolicy.GradeMapping
    A grade mapping entry from the YAML policy.
    RulePolicy.SeverityMapping
    A severity mapping entry from the YAML policy.
    RulePolicyLoader
    Parses a YAML rule policy file into a RulePolicy with pre-parsed expressions.
    RuleScope
    Structured scope metadata for a scoring rule, indicating which protocol layer, TLS versions, and specific mechanism the rule applies to.
